Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Order Of Dismissal Without Prejudice.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BRYAN SCHMID'S Motion For Order Of Dismissal Without Prejudice is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
